mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (user_id, category_id, title, content, summary, view_count, like_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.category_id, a.title, a.content, a.summary, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.create_time, a.update_time, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM article a LEFT JOIN `user` u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article
(title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND
category_id = #{categoryId}
